# kCMVideoCodecType_MPEG1Video | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Media ](/documentation/coremedia)

-  kCMVideoCodecType_MPEG1Video 

Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_MPEG1Video

A type that identifies the MPEG-1 video format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_MPEG1Video: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
